transcripts.title: Tyler — Henderson Kitchen Walkthrough
transcripts.summary: Henderson wants Calacatta for kitchen island. Discussed waterfall edge option (+$600). Budget around $8K. Prefers April install.

commitments.what: Check if they want flooring quote too

transcripts.title: Craig — Coastal Properties Site Visit
transcripts.summary: 12-unit development, all quartz countertops throughout. Need bulk pricing. Rep wants proposal by end of next week. Potential $60K+ deal.

transcripts.title: Craig — Supplier Call Atlantic Stone
transcripts.summary: Discussed Caesarstone Empira White availability. Can get 8 slabs by next Tuesday. Pricing at $1,650/slab for bulk.

commitments.what: Confirm order quantity for Empira White
